name: johannesfritz-cc-data-science-team
description: Data science team tools for structured document classification, version comparison, external database matching, and analytical workflows.

plugins.name: data-science-team
plugins.description: Structured document classification, version comparison, external database matching, and analytical workflows. Extract and tag passages against user-defined schemas, cross-check between sources, and produce validated datasets. Use for policy reports, regulatory filings, research documents, or any structured text analysis.
